name: dejaviewed
description: Turn your saved posts and bookmarks from Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, Pinterest, and browser bookmarks into a searchable, curated dark-mode catalog site with deep-dive guides, knowledge graphs, and an agent context layer. Full pipeline: ingest → classify → enrich → tier → deep dives → graphs → render.
author: Gabicus

skills.name: dejaviewed
skills.description: Turn saved posts and bookmarks from any platform into a searchable catalog site with deep dives, knowledge graphs, and agent context
